data.name: 慾之夢
data.detailed_description:
【遊戲角色】

由紀

常人眼中很有大小姐風範的千金，自我意識過剩，刻薄的毒舌不會饒過任何人。總會用大膽和出人意料的行為來掩飾自己的懦弱，但其實，她兒時在男主的影響下，始終堅守著內心的正義感。
CV：餅梨あむ

山葬冴

看似強勢，不以接近的高冷少女，平日裏殺伐果斷，實則是個心思細膩，性格溫柔體貼，會體會他人的感受與痛苦，卻不從不顯露於表。甚至會害怕小蟲子的可愛女孩。

CV： 橘かずら

【遊戲劇情】

因被誣陷而被勒令退學，導致人生走向陌路的男主。每日躲在陰暗的房間中，苟且度日。原以為這樣的生活將不會更糟，可誰知因陷入網路裸聊的騙局，而陷入了黑幫與世安局的爭鬥之中。

不僅被世安局逮捕入獄，甚至被判處死刑。要麼成為千金小姐的狗，要麼作為冷豔殺手的人質，才有可能獲得一線生機。

世安局局長的千金與黑幫幫主的女兒，你將做出自己的選擇。

現代科技與貧民窟的對立，世安局與黑幫的爭奪，第三方神秘勢力，以及怪異的異形生物。一切的矛盾都被籠罩上了不可窺視的迷霧。將你過去的人生徹底粉碎，從頭來過，解開所有的謎團，成為這個城市的英雄吧。

【遊戲特色】

❤2名女主角全程日語配音

❤2名女角色可供H和調教

❤4K高質量動態HCG

❤多樣的遊戲玩法 視覺小說+塔防戰鬥 

❤單手操作，暢快體驗

❤角色換裝+角色live2d交互

【特別鳴謝】

特別鳴謝測試人員：KENT

data.supported_languages:
英文, 繁體中文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 丹麥文, 烏克蘭文, 俄文, 保加利亞文, 印尼語, 土耳其文, 挪威文, 捷克文, 日文*, 泰文, 簡體中文, 荷蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 越南文, 阿拉伯文, 韓文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows7/8/10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 4.5 or better
  • 儲存空間: 10 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows7/8/10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 4.5 or better
  • 儲存空間: 10 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: MacOs
  • 處理器: m1 m2 m3 or Intel
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 4.5 or better
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: MacOs
  • 處理器: m1 m2 m3 or Intel
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 4.5 or better
  • 儲存空間: 20 GB 可用空間

data.name: Dream Lust
data.detailed_description:
【Game Characters】

YUI
CV：餅梨あむ

She is a princess in the eyes of others, with an oversized sense of self and a vicious tongue that won't spare anyone. She always hides her cowardice with bold and unexpected behaviour, but in fact, under the influence of the male lead in her childhood, she has always been adhering to her inner sense of justice.

Yamaburi YA

CV：橘かずら

She seems to be a strong, unapproachable and cold girl who is a ruthless killer, but in fact, she is a sweet girl with a delicate mind and a gentle and considerate character who will understand the feelings and pain of others, but never show it, and is even afraid of the little bugs.

 

【Game Story】

After being falsely accused and ordered to drop out of school, you are forced to hide in a dark room and live your life. You thought your life could not get any worse, but you fell into a scam of online nude chatting and got caught in the middle of a fight between the gangs and the WSA.

You are not only arrested and imprisoned by the WSA, you are even sentenced to death. You have to either be the dog of a young lady or the hostage of a ruthless killer to have a chance of survival.

You will make your own choice between the daughter of the head of the WSA and the daughter of a gangster.

Modern technology versus the slums, the WSA versus the gangs, third-party mysterious forces, and strange alien creatures - all of these conflicts are shrouded in an impenetrable fog that will shatter your past life. Start over, solve all the mysteries, and become the hero of the city.

【Game Features】

❤2 female characters dubbed in Japanese

❤2 female characters for H and dominating

❤4K High Quality Dynamic HCG

❤Versatile Gameplay Visual Novel + Tower Defence Battle

❤One-handed operation, smooth experience

❤Character dressing + character live 2d interaction
